content.text:
Cannot execute multiple commands at once.
Please run each command separately OR chain them into a single command via && or ;
Provided commands:
(1) sed -i 's/for (auto&& stmt : obj->subs)/for (auto\&\& stmt : obj->subs) {\n    if (stmt) {/' /workspace/YatCC/task/3/EmitIR.cpp
(2) sed -i 's/self(stmt);/self(stmt);\n    }/' /workspace/YatCC/task/3/EmitIR.cpp
